title: Rock A Bye, Babies
content:
"Rock a bye, babies,
        Your cradle hangs high;
        Soft down your pillow,
        Your curtain the sky.
        Father will feed you,
        While mother will sing,
        And shelter our darlings
        With her warm wing."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Louisa May Alcott delivers a powerful performance in "Rock A Bye, Babies"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
